name: Edwards Mansion Orange Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 ⅓ cups Butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour and sugar.
2. Add the baking powder to the dry mixture and stir until combined.
3. Add the butter and shortening; cut in with your fingers or a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Stir in the milk and eggs until just combined.
5. Gently fold in the orange juice.
6. Fold in the diced tangerine sections.
7. Grease a 12-cup muffin pan.
8. Fill each muffin cavity about two-thirds full with batter.
9. Place an orange section on top of each muffin.
10. Bake at 375°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Makes 3 dozen muffins.
